{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322015147A19E999291E59955378E"}"},"total":170},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7467157188869964568","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我了个逗，看多了那些从开头到结尾，非要等主角死了才忏悔的伪人文。乍一看这本书还不太适应，太爽了！！！！！[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738585536,"group_id":"7460773524924271640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最近没什么好文，看一本恶心一次，我还是老老实实的看以前的书吧","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1AlVcr8kXConSAxEobGmY34TTX39XHOt08W4t22Svsn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/af67422b8279495eb2af01dbe425fc22~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704898&x-signature=dgywKVZFPpJJlRp11rD%2FdriIgx8%3D","user_id":"3140653677027752","user_name":"悲伤的小狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3140653677027752","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7460773524924271640","book_info":{"abstract":"【颠+沙雕＋搞笑＋爽文＋娱乐圈＋真假少爷+无cp】
　　叶泠一睁眼，穿成了小说里的豪门真少爷！
　　大姐是冷傲总裁。
　　二姐是知名大律师。
　　三姐白天是模特，晚上是暗夜赛车手。
　　但是他们都有一个特点，全都偏心假少爷。
　　让他这个亲弟弟住最差的。
　　吃饭是随便的。
　　说不好还要把他送进精神医院的！
　　不过叶泠有暴击统。
　　一怒之下！
　　无差别攻击。
　　吃饭是可以掀桌的，不高兴是可以砸家的！假少爷是可以狂揍的！
　　——
　　上综艺被黑？
　　不存在！
　　叶泠无脑发疯！
　　主打一个疯批你别惹！
　　来一个干一个，来两个“双杀”！
　　恶到全网不敢黑。
　　只是不知道为什么。
　　时间久了……
　　三个姐姐：不能没有弟弟，否则整个家都不对劲了！
　　网友们：不能没有叶泠，否则我们的生活都无趣了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o811b4d885aeb1df970c756c4a8b2a7f4~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"少喝茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7460773524924271640","book_name":"真少爷真缺德，国家编制也是真领","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8514人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7460775264105021976","read_count":"8514","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1013393"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"456","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,娱乐圈,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/da160b8c44f0d27b324059f88266eeb4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779299507&x-signature=T%2Fx%2BAsTIw567dH6%2F8AnY7VA90j4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1912801033716316","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"52"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322015147A19E999291E59955378E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co
